title: Data Compression Formats
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
text: Data Compression Formats Transporting large amounts of data from servers to clients can result in performance problems. A possible solution is to reduce the size of the data being transferred by compressing it. This has to be balanced against the CPU time required to perform the compression. You can use the $NET_FMT setting to specify the data compression format of hit data returned from server to client. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
